module.name: common
module.purpose: Shared common crate root for reusable config loading, external re-export adapters, logging, and structure utilities. lib.rs no longer declares or re-exports protocol contracts; session/task/step/execution/tool protocol models are owned by the top-level marix-protocol crate.

childModules.name: config
childModules.purpose: Owns the common crate configuration model, config-file discovery, platform detection, alias substitution, credential resolution, runtime path normalization, and tool directory settings.

childModules.name: external
childModules.purpose: Owns public re-export wrappers for third-party libraries so downstream crates can route third-party access through common where appropriate.

childModules.name: logging
childModules.purpose: Owns tagged log messages, logging errors, config-gated log writes, process-role path selection, log-file creation, and pruning.

childModules.name: structure
childModules.purpose: Owns shared structural data interfaces such as WorkQueue and channel helpers.
